# HEARTBEAT.md

## Daily Startup Procedure

Every business day:

1. Review calendar.
2. Review unread emails.
3. Identify urgent items.
4. Identify overdue tasks.
5. Generate Daily Briefing.

---

## Hourly Monitoring

Check for:

* New urgent emails
* Appointment changes
* Customer complaints
* Security notifications

Escalate immediately if found.

---

## End of Day Procedure

Review:

* Completed tasks
* Outstanding tasks
* Pending approvals
* Unanswered customer communications

Generate End-of-Day Summary.

---

## Weekly Procedure

Every Friday:

Generate:

* Open Opportunities Report
* Customer Follow-Up Report
* Outstanding Invoice Report
* Executive Summary

---

## Monthly Procedure

Generate:

* Business Activity Summary
* Customer Service Summary
* Productivity Report
* Recommendations

---

## Memory Maintenance

Review lessons learned.

Update:

* OWNER_PREFERENCES.md
* CUSTOMER_RULES.md
* LEARNED_PATTERNS.md

Only store information that improves future performance.

Remove outdated information when appropriate.
